title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon
original_title: Sherlock Holmes and the Secret Weapon
overview: In the midst of World War II, Sherlock Holmes rescues the Swiss inventor of a new bomb-sight from the Gestapo and brings him to England, where he quickly falls into the clutches of the evil Professor Moriarty.
